verdict: A well-structured Easy chart with comfortable flow and good density tracking, though it suffers from a highly repetitive chorus and minor off-beat syncopations.

issues.problem: The hold starts on an off-beat (8th note) at 27.712, which breaks the established quarter-note rhythm and may confuse beginner players.
An isolated 8th-note step occurs here, transitioning immediately into a hold at 38.968, which is slightly too complex for an Easy difficulty.
The 4-beat pattern (Jump LR -> D -> U -> L) is repeated almost 7 times consecutively without any variation, making the main chorus feel overly repetitive and mechanical.
